title: How a perfectly even universe grew galaxies - Adam Brown
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews physicist Adam Brown on how an initially uniform universe developed gravitational structure and galaxies. The episode explores cosmological principles and mechanisms of structure formation in the early universe.
